message:
refactor: use centralized spellcheck workflow and remove add-to-project (#3617)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,41 +0,0 @@
-name: Add issues to project
-
-on:
-  issues:
-    types:
-      - opened
-      - reopened
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-
-jobs:
-  create-update-project:
-    if: github.repository_owner == 'kubestellar'
-    name: Create/update project issue
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    permissions:
-      contents: write
-    steps:
-      - name: Get current date
-        id: date
-        run: echo "date=$(date +'%Y-%m-%d')" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
-
-      - uses: actions/checkout@8e8c483db84b4bee98b60c0593521ed34d9990e8
-        with:
-          token: ${{ secrets.GH_ALL_PROJECT_TOKEN }}
-          persist-credentials: "false"
-
-      - uses: actions/add-to-project@244f685bbc3b7adfa8466e08b698b5577571133e # This adds the issue to the project
-        with:
-          project-url: https://github.com/orgs/kubestellar/projects/5
-          github-token: ${{ secrets.GH_ALL_PROJECT_TOKEN }}
-        id: add-project
-
-      - uses: titoportas/update-project-fields@421a54430b3cdc9eefd8f14f9ce0142ab7678751
-        with:
-          project-url: https://github.com/orgs/kubestellar/projects/5
-          github-token: ${{ secrets.GH_ALL_PROJECT_TOKEN }}
-          item-id: ${{ steps.add-project.outputs.itemId }} # Use the item-id output of the previous step
-          field-keys: Status,Date Posted
-          field-values: New,${{ steps.date.outputs.date }}

@@ -1,49 +1,22 @@
 name: Spellcheck Action
-run-name: Spellcheck Action - ${{ github.ref_name }}
 
 on:
-  # So we can trigger manually if needed
   workflow_dispatch:
   schedule:
     - cron: "0 9 * * 5"
-  # To confirm any changes to docs build successfully, without deploying them
-  #  pull_request:
-  #    branches:
-  #      - main
-  #      - "release-*"
-  #    paths:
-  #      - "docs/**"
-  #      - ".github/workflows/spellcheck_action.yaml"
   push:
     branches:
       - main
       - "release-*"
-      - "doc-*"
     paths:
       - ".github/workflows/spellcheck_action.yml"
       - ".github/spellcheck/.spellcheck.yml"
       - ".github/spellcheck/.wordlist.txt"
-#      - "docs/**"
 
 permissions:
   contents: read
 
 jobs:
-  build:
-    name: Spellcheck
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@8e8c483db84b4bee98b60c0593521ed34d9990e8
-
-      - uses: rojopolis/spellcheck-github-actions@cebe06444da3ac5e9d3146f5f02a0e2a236f7488
-        name: Spellcheck
-        with:
-          config_path: .github/spellcheck/.spellcheck.yml
-          output_file: spellcheck-output.txt
-          # source_files: "docs/content/*"
-
-      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@b7c566a772e6b6bfb58ed0dc250532a479d7789f
-        if: success() || failure()
-        with:
-          name: Spellcheck Output
-          path: spellcheck-output.txt
+  spellcheck:
+    uses: kubestellar/infra/.github/workflows/reusable-spellcheck.yml@main
+    secrets: inherit
